compiled_state.title: Update test_revert_event.py: add test for .archived marker removal when reverting an ARCHIVED event
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What
Modify tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py to add a test asserting that ticket-revert.sh removes the .archived marker file when the reverted event is an ARCHIVED event.

## Tests to add (must FAIL before T8 implementation)

1. test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker:
   Given: a temp tracker with a ticket that has an ARCHIVED event AND a .archived marker file
   When: ticket-revert.sh is called with the UUID of the ARCHIVED event
   Then: the .archived marker file NO LONGER EXISTS in the ticket dir after the command completes
   AND: a REVERT event file IS written (the revert event itself)

2. test_revert_non_archived_event_preserves_marker:
   Given: a temp tracker with a ticket that has a STATUS event AND a .archived marker file (unusual but possible)
   When: ticket-revert.sh is called with the UUID of the STATUS event (not the ARCHIVED event)
   Then: the .archived marker file STILL EXISTS (marker not removed when non-ARCHIVED event is reverted)

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py (MODIFY — add 2 test functions)
- .test-index (add entry: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-revert.sh: tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py)
   AND add RED marker: [test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker]

## Note: ticket-revert.sh → test_revert_event.py is NOT fuzzy-matchable
Normalized source 'ticketrevertsh' is not a substring of 'testreverteventpy'. The .test-index entry is required for the test gate to associate them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both new test functions exist in test_revert_event.py
  Verify: grep -c "def test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker\|def test_revert_non_archived_event_preserves_marker" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker FAILS before implementation (RED)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py::test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry added for ticket-revert.sh
  Verify: grep -q "ticket-revert.sh.*test_revert_event" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ruff lint passes on modified test file
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_revert_event.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ (test addition only — test_revert_archived_event_removes_marker is RED as expected, test_revert_non_archived_event_preserves_marker passes)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 5 ACs verified: both test functions exist, RED test fails on current code (exit 1), .test-index entry added, RED marker added, ruff passes
comments.author: Test
